CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-02-2011 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion For Assignment Order In Aid Of Judgment Pursuant To Ccp 708.510
Off Calendar Oct-28-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., A NATIONAL BANKING ASSOCIATION'S MOTION FOR ASSIGNMENT ORDER IN AID OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP SECTION 708.510.

APPEARANCES: Elizabeth A. MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 specially appearing for pltf & moving party; no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Not reported

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for the Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A. a National Banking Assoc.
Order waiving live testimony of witness is in the court's file.
After hearing the testimony and considering of the filed declaration and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Scott Holley as follows:
Damages (balance on Principal) $94,156.82
Prejudgment Interest $16,497.02
Attorney's Fees $2,773.13
Costs $385.00, for a total of $113,811.97
No later than 05-18-10 Counsel to prepare the Judgment and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-15-11 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 610
